description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian:stretch Docker image and runs a before_script that updates apt and installs libc-dev gcc make autoconf automake libncurses-dev gnutls-dev. Define a single stage called test. Add a test job in the test stage that executes ./autogen.sh autoconf, then ./configure --without-makeinfo, and finally make check. The job inherits the before_script and has no artifacts, caches, or special rules.
